title: Fix regression suite
description:
The PostgreSQL regression triage work should not start until the regression harness and baseline suite execution are in a usable state.

This issue tracks the work required to make the regression suite runnable enough that per-file triage can be done against trustworthy results.

title: Triage regression file xmlmap.sql
description:
Map out the PostgreSQL features and behaviors needed for a full pass of upstream regression file xmlmap.sql.

Triage for this file should include:
- mapping the SQL features, builtin objects, planner/executor behaviors, and protocol expectations needed for the file to pass
- creating follow-up issues for each missing or incorrect feature
- adding dependency edges so the feature work blocks completion of this triage item appropriately

This task is intentionally blocked on fixing the regression suite first, because the triage should be based on trustworthy regression results.
